prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜近年排名约 173–198 名，2026 年未进入前 200，属中后段 211；近年声誉平稳，无显著正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度一般（总排名第 106 位，综合热度 49565），报考关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中青海大学无 A- 及以上等级学科数据，学科竞争力相对一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程、临床医学等专业社会热度持续偏热，对相关专业报考有一定拉动；本省 2026 年物理类考生估算约 30672 人，与 2025 年（30457 人）基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年计划小幅扩招约 3.6%、考生总数基本持平、预计 2026 年竞争较 2025 年略有加剧，位次继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约 15552 名，区间 15052–16052 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest ranking for the science group was approximately 879 → 12245 → 13001 → 9440 → 15205, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 15205, a significant backward shift of about 5765 compared to 2024. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 2637 in 2021, 1768 in 2022, 1772 in 2023, 1361 in 2024, and 1348 in 2025 (Physics Category). The 2026 plan is 1397, a slight expansion of about 3.6% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 173–198, not entering the top 200 in 2026, belonging to the middle-to-lower tier of 211 universities. Reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 106th overall, comprehensive popularity 49565), indicating low application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no data on disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively average disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be socially popular, which has a certain pulling effect on applications for related majors. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 30672, basically the same as 2025 (30457).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan by about 3.6%, the basically unchanged total number of candidates, and the expectation that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, the ranking is expected to continue a slight backward shift. The predicted lowest ranking is about 15552, with a range of 15052–16052.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15052–16052, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15000), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Clinical Medicine (Excellent Physician) and Stomatology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 16000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
